description: TAB (TSCG-Agentic-Bench) experiment configuration — Single Source of Truth

seed_policy.description: Primary seed for all task generation. Validation seeds for multi-seed robustness check.

excluded.reason: Thinking models decompress schemas in CoT, yielding 0% accuracy. Known limitation documented in paper.

A.name: Claude Code
A.description: Real agent tools from Claude Code (16 tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, etc.)
A.note: tscg_sad only applied to Claude (SAD model-protection enforced). GPT-5.2 added for frontier comparison.

B.name: MCP Servers
B.description: Protocol schemas from 4 MCP servers (GitHub, Filesystem, PostgreSQL, Playwright)
B.note: 5 server collections, 3 runs for statistical significance. GPT-5.2 added.

C.name: Scaling
C.description: Synthetic catalogs scaling from 3 to 100 tools (seed=42)
C.note: 2 frontier models (Claude + GPT-5.2) for cross-model scaling comparison. No tscg_sad.

D.name: Small Models
D.description: Small-model (3B-14B) stress test across increasing tool catalog sizes
D.note: All calls local via Ollama. No tscg_sad (SAD disabled for non-Claude). 3 runs for statistical significance.

hypotheses.H-D3: Measurable threshold shift (tool count where accuracy drops below 50%)

contingency.plan_b: If ARR < 80% at 50 tools → focus narrative on 3-25 tools scaling curve ('TSCG doubles usable tool count')
contingency.plan_c: If < 5pp improvement → focus paper on frontier efficiency, small-model as appendix

E.name: Multi-Collection Stress
E.description: Combined Claude Code + MCP tools in a single context (NOT multi-agent orchestration)
E.note: Renamed from 'Multi-Agent' to 'Multi-Collection Stress'. 2 frontier models. True multi-agent → Future Work.

gsm8k.name: GSM8K-Under-Load
gsm8k.description: Mathematical reasoning accuracy under tool-schema load pressure
gsm8k.note: 1000 API calls (frontier) + 800 local (Ollama). load=0 is baseline (no tools). GPT-5.2 added.

bfcl.name: BFCL-style Function-Calling Suite
bfcl.description: BFCL-inspired schema subset (15 tools: 5 simple, 5 multiple, 5 relevance detection)
bfcl.note: Labeled 'BFCL-style' (not official BFCL subset). 15 tools vs BFCL's 1,600+ functions. GPT-5.2 added.

budget.note: ~65% of all calls are local/free via Ollama

scoring.parameter_f1: F1 score on parameter key-value pairs
scoring.no_tool: binary: model correctly abstains from tool use

statistical_tests.primary: Paired t-test (Natural vs TSCG accuracy per model x scenario)
statistical_tests.effect_size: Cohen's d with Hedges' g small-sample correction
